branch.branch_summary: Define the v7.4 Governed Parallel Lanes slice: split a bounded work item into parallel lanes, require lane-local evidence, record join/conflict semantics, and close only through Council-approved merge or stop decision.

tree_answer.where_are_we: The runtime is between v7.3 and the next concrete branch.
tree_answer.why_this_branch: After v7.3.0, advance v7.4 Governed Parallel Lanes: prove that multiple bounded actor lanes can run with explicit join, conflict, blocker, and Council decision semantics without weakening Work Execution Packet or Multi-Actor Pilot evidence.
tree_answer.what_branch_comes_next: Open an implementation task for the current frontier: Define the v7.4 Governed Parallel Lanes slice: split a bounded work item into parallel lanes, require lane-local evidence, record join/conflict semantics, and close only through Council-approved merge or stop decision.
